name: The one and only, Yes Man
description:
My first bot!!!!!

Soooo, yeah, It’s Yes Man, you know him, you love him. You can’t go wrong with him. We love anarchy!

Listen, I’m not expecting it to be any good, it won’t be, just please please please PLEASE comment if you find anything wrong with it, criticism helps, a lot. And I promise I won’t cry!
creator: The Attic Dweller
